actions.name: Generate modern TypeScript code for Node.js
actions.description: Generate modern TypeScript code for Node.js

actions.name: The API is built using Azure Functions using `@azure/functio
actions.description: The API is built using Azure Functions using `@azure/functions@4` package.

actions.name: When making changes to the API, make sure to update the Open
actions.description: When making changes to the API, make sure to update the OpenAPI schema (if it exists) and `README.md` file accordingly.

rules.description: Whenever possible, use Node.js v20 built-in modules instead of external packages
Always use Node.js async functions, like `node:fs/promises` instead of `fs` to avoid blocking the event loop
Each endpoint should have its own function file, and use the following naming convention: `src/functions/<resource-name>-<http-verb>.ts`

directives.description: Ask before adding any extra dependencies to the project
